blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,479 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 36".
